caption: A screen recording captures a webpage from the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) website. The top of the page features a blue header with the white IRS logo on the left and navigation options for "SEARCH | HELP | MENU" on the right. Below the header, large black text on a white background reads, "IRS reminds those over age 72 to start withdrawals from IRAs and retirement plans to avoid penalties." A white mouse cursor is visible, hovering over the text. The bottom of the image displays a Windows taskbar with various application icons, including a web browser and system settings. Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains static, with no movement from the cursor or changes to the displayed text or page layout.
